headline: Apple reports stronger than expected quarterly revenue
body: Apple announced quarterly revenue above analyst expectations, citing strong services growth and higher iPhone sales.

headline: Tesla faces production delay at new facility
body: Tesla said deliveries from its new facility will be delayed because of supply chain issues affecting specialized components.

headline: Nvidia announces new data center chip demand
body: Nvidia said cloud providers increased orders for its latest data center chips during the quarter.

headline: Microsoft expands enterprise AI cloud contracts
body: Microsoft announced several large enterprise cloud agreements tied to AI infrastructure and productivity tools.
